title: ‘People admire scars’: MEPs fear Le Pen more than Bardella

content: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen will have to chew over much more than just hors d'oeuvres Wednesday evening at a working dinner with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
